# ClientPrefundResponseDTO


## Properties

Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**amount** | **number** | The amount transferred to account. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**message** | **string** | This field will return a success message if the prefund request added successfully | [optional] [default to undefined]
**status** | **string** | The status. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**systemReferenceNumber** | **string** | The transaction reference number or identifier generated by card issuance platform for the client prefund request. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**uniquePayerId** | **string** | The unique email ID provided to the customer in addition to uniquePaymentId for supported regions and configuration, or else it will be null, for example, abc12_ca@nium.com. | [optional] [default to undefined]
**uniquePaymentId** | **string** | The virtual account number per currency provided to customers for supported regions and configuration, for example, IBAN in EU, virtual account number from Moonova in AU, or else, it will be null. | [optional] [default to undefined]
